name: Radio
short: Stream a radio URL into voice and show now playing status.
description: Streams a configured radio URL into a voice channel using FFmpeg, keeps the voice channel status updated with Icecast now playing metadata, and automatically joins or leaves based on listeners.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: Radio loaded! Use `[p]radio url <stream_url>`, then `[p]radio autoplay <voice_channel>`. Manual overrides are `[p]radio forcejoin [voice_channel]` and `[p]radio forcestop`. The host needs ffmpeg installed.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores configured radio stream URLs, optional voice channel IDs, optional text channel IDs, optional status API URLs, status feature settings, and the bot's status message IDs per guild. It does not store voice audio.
